summary: The AI agent failed to address the patient's requests and exhibited poor conversational flow, leading to an incomplete interaction.

issues.title: Failure to Address Patient Requests
issues.details: The agent did not respond to the patient's request for a Metformin refill or for scheduling a diabetes follow-up, resulting in an unresolved call.
issues.expected: The agent should have acknowledged both requests and provided appropriate responses or next steps.

issues.title: Incorrect Call Handling
issues.details: The agent abruptly ended the call without completing the conversation or confirming if the patient needed anything else.
issues.expected: The agent should have maintained the call until all patient requests were addressed or confirmed.

issues.title: Lack of Patient Verification
issues.details: The agent did not verify the patient's identity before processing the refill request, which is a critical step in ensuring patient safety.
issues.expected: The agent should have asked for identifying information to verify the patient's identity before proceeding with the requests.
